description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
What's Changed
- chore: handle ChunkLoadError by refreshing page by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1619
- chore: fix loading chunk error of optional chaining for Android WebView below 80 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1626
- layout: fix nested toc items not expanded in very long toc list, closes #1625 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1629
- doc: add deepwiki badge and link by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1630
- chore: bump tauri, next and zustand to latest versions by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1631
- api: fix cors for api with new nextjs version by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1633
- chore: downgrade next.js to 15.3 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1634
- doc: run a preview build to identify compatibility issues between OpenNext, Next.js, and Supabase by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1635
- fix: chaining file open with OS opening the highest precedence, closes #1622 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1636
- layout: fix layout for auth and user page by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1637
- library: fix book not redownloaded for the redownload button in detail modal, closes #1628 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1638
- tts: convert iso6392 language code to iso6391 to filter tts voices, closes #1627 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1639
- fix: set xdg-mime with mime type other than scheme, closes #1621 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1641
- release: version 0.9.66 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1643
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.65...v0.9.66
